description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a simple, modern design. It features three horizontal surfaces: a solid top, a middle shelf, and a bottom shelf, all supported by four sturdy, slightly tapered legs. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The shelves are open on all sides, allowing easy access and visibility from any angle. There are no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing its minimalist style. The unit is suitable for storing or displaying items in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages.
description: A minimalist, rectangular wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and visible wood grain, supported by four sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the shelving unit, with all three shelves clearly visible and open.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the wooden panels, with the open structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open back and the same three-shelf configuration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, displaying the depth and open sides of the shelves.
